title: polymorphic_embed with type dispatch in changeset
prompt: Using the polymorphic_embed library, build a WebhookEvent that can carry different payload types (UserCreated, OrderPlaced, PaymentFailed). Each payload is an embedded_schema with its own fields. The WebhookEvent schema declares `polymorphic_embeds_one :payload, types: [user_created: UserCreated, order_placed: OrderPlaced, payment_failed: PaymentFailed], on_type_not_found: :changeset_error`. Write the event + three payload modules to lib/my_app/webhooks/webhook_event.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires the on_type_not_found option which is niche but important for webhook validation.
